extra_commands: curl -s https://qrbanner.com/sitemap.xml | grep -oE '/templates/[a-z0-9-]+' | sort -u > /tmp/t.txt; F=0; while read -r p; do c=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' "http://127.0.0.1:3000$p"); [ "$c" != "200" ] && { echo "FAIL $p $c"; F=$((F+1)); }; done < /tmp/t.txt; echo "CHECKED $(wc -l < /tmp/t.txt)"; [ $F -eq 0 ] && echo ALL_OK || echo "FAILS $F"; rm -f /tmp/t.txt
